name: Fallert School Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Ste. Genevieve R-II School District (sole/primary contract since 1953)
recent_news: 2024: Ste. Genevieve R-II school district pursued a five-year lease-purchase of Fallert's property, bus fleet, building, contents, and radio tower from Fallert Bus Service Inc; Buck Jokerst was longtime manager until May 2024 — district is in-housing transportation, signaling business is winding down.
fit_notes: Likely NOT a viable Summit tuck-in — sole customer (Ste. Gen R-II) has already purchased Fallert's fleet/facility via lease-purchase in 2024 and brought transportation in-house. Single-district 70-year family operator with classic succession profile, but the contract base has effectively been transferred to the district.

name: Fortuna Bus Co Inc
districts_or_customers: NYC Department of Education (Office of Pupil Transportation)
recent_news: No public M&A or news identified through 2026; remains a small independent NYC DOE school-bus contractor.
website: https://fortunetransportation.com (per pilot; may not resolve — D&B/Manta cite 'fortunabus@yahoo.com' as primary contact)
fit_notes: Small (~$1.4M rev, ~38 employees) NYC DOE pre-K/SPED-adjacent contractor in the heavily-consolidated NYC market. Could be a micro tuck-in if Summit wants NYC DOE OPT exposure, but scale is sub-scale relative to platform peers (Logan, Pioneer, Consolidated). Founder Vaysberg ownership ~20 years — moderate succession angle.

name: Premiere Bus Co Inc
owner_or_parent: unknown (co-located with Pride Transportation Services, MJT Bus Company, and Approved Transportation Service at 925 Shepherd Ave — suggests common ownership/yard sharing)
districts_or_customers: NYC DOE (likely, given Brooklyn yard and co-tenants are NYC school-bus contractors)
recent_news: No M&A or material news identified. Pilot-record website 'Empirebus.com' now redirects to Model 1 (an EV school-bus dealer), not a company site — original Empire Bus domain appears repurposed.
fit_notes: Possible micro NYC DOE operator within a cluster of small co-located bus companies at 925 Shepherd Ave (Pride, MJT, Approved) — pattern suggests one family/group operating multiple small entities for OPT contract purposes. Could be interesting as a multi-entity carve-up if ownership is common; investigate Pride/MJT/Approved together. Confidence low until ownership confirmed.

name: STP Transportation
recent_news: D&B records list STP Transportation Inc as a 2-employee, ~$98K revenue operation at 601 Surf Ave — materially smaller than pilot file's 41 employees / $1.6M revenue figure, suggesting either (a) wrong company matched, (b) the entity is a paper-thin shell, or (c) pilot estimates are inflated. No NYC DOE OPT vendor listing identified.
website: https://stptransportation.com (could not resolve in test — ECONNREFUSED)
fit_notes: Profile is highly uncertain — D&B shows this as a 2-employee, ~$98K revenue Coney Island address (residential — 601 Surf Ave Apt 4N), inconsistent with school-bus contractor scale. Likely a misclassified livery/car-service or sub-scale operator. Not a credible Summit tuck-in target without further confirmation.

name: Janet Cioffi School Bus
owner_or_parent: unknown — likely sole-proprietor 'Janet Cioffi' if a real operator
principals: Janet Cioffi (per business name and Florida Sunbiz officer records; also listed as director of Pet Grooming D&J Inc in Hialeah)
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade County Public Schools area (Hialeah) — likely private route/charter contracts to MDCPS schools, unverified
recent_news: No public news; entity does not have a confirmable independent website (pilot site 'familyfoodrewards.com' is unrelated). Buzzfile lists a 'Janet Cioffi School Bus' entry with a phone number associated with 'Expert Grooming Pet' — strongly suggests the listing is a directory artifact rather than a substantive operating business.
website: Not identified (pilot listed 'Familyfoodrewards.Com' which is unrelated; no operating company website found)
fit_notes: Existence as a real, scalable school-bus operator is highly questionable — Janet Cioffi shows up in Florida corporate records tied to a pet-grooming entity rather than transportation, and the pilot's 36 employees / $1.6M revenue figures are not corroborated anywhere public. Likely a stale directory listing or micro sole-prop. Not a credible Summit target without on-the-ground verification.
